title: The State of Italian Business in Malaysia
summary: A continuously updated record of Italian companies and institutions in Malaysia, by sector and city, set against the macro indicators that move the market. Compiled from primary registries and reconciled company by company.

companySources.name: Italian Chamber of Commerce in Malaysia

methodology: We publish companies with a confirmed Italian connection — ownership, founding, brand or distribution ties, Italian Chamber (ITALCHAM) membership, or verified research — alongside the Italian institutions in Malaysia. Records are compiled from the ITALCHAM roster, ICE — Italian Trade Agency, and CRIF/SSM registrations, de-duplicated by company. A wider set of listed-but-unverified firms is held back pending verification. Each record carries its sources and review status, and figures are point-in-time. Macro indicators are drawn from official releases and refreshed on a schedule. Corrections welcome.
dataStatus: LIVE — company register holds confirmed-Italian entries only. Macro indicators are still placeholder figures pending live source feeds (see macro.json note).
